title: Packaging Dieline Flat Net

imagePrompts.prompt: Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.

Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.

imagePrompts.title: Packaging Dieline Flat Net

prompt: Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.
originalPrompt: Flatten 3D packaging into 2D net. Expand all panels and tabs. Orthographic projection, no distortion. Map textures precisely. Add contrasting die-lines. Pure white background.

promptTranslations.zh: 将 3D 包装扁平化为 2D 网络。展开所有面板和选项卡。正投影，无畸变。精确映射纹理。添加对比鲜明的模切线。纯白色背景。
promptTranslations.fr: Aplatissez l'emballage 3D en un filet 2D. Développez tous les panneaux et onglets. Projection orthographique, pas de distorsion. Cartographiez les textures avec précision. Ajoutez des lignes de découpe contrastées. Fond blanc pur.
promptTranslations.ru: Сведите 3D-упаковку в 2D-сетку. Разверните все панели и вкладки. Ортографическая проекция, без искажений. Точно отображайте текстуры. Добавьте контрастные линии штампа. Чистый белый фон.
promptTranslations.pt: Achate a embalagem 3D em uma rede 2D. Expanda todos os painéis e guias. Projeção ortográfica, sem distorção. Mapeie texturas com precisão. Adicione linhas contrastantes. Fundo branco puro.
promptTranslations.ja: 3D パッケージを 2D ネットにフラット化します。すべてのパネルとタブを展開します。正投影、歪みなし。テクスチャを正確にマッピングします。コントラストのあるダイラインを追加します。真っ白な背景。
promptTranslations.ko: 3D 패키징을 2D 넷으로 평면화합니다. 모든 패널과 탭을 확장합니다. 직교 투영, 왜곡 없음. 텍스처를 정확하게 매핑합니다. 대조되는 다이라인을 추가하세요. 순수한 흰색 배경입니다.

authorName: Mia Taylor | Ad Creative & Meta Ads
